com.scm.all.pfunc

类 CGRDesignerEventHandler

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.scm.all.pfunc.CGRDesignerEventHandler

  • public class CGRDesignerEventHandler
extends java.lang.Object
    报表设计回调

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      CGRDesignerEventHandler() 

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      int onBeforeDoAction(int actionEnum)
      BeforeDoAction - Triggered before each task action is executed Parameters: actionEnum - Action enumeration value: 101: Undo 102: Redo 103: Cut 104: Paste 105: Copy 106: Delete 107: SelectAll 201: AutoAdjustTextBoxSize 202: AutoGenerateColumns 203: AutoGenerateFields 204: MoveSectionUp 205: MoveSectionDown 206: AutoGenerateParameters 207: AutoGenerateDataSetFields 301: OpenPageSetupDialog 302: OpenDataBindingDialog 303: OpenParameterCollectionDialog 304: OpenGroupCollectionDialog 305: OpenColumnCollectionDialog 306: OpenFieldCollectionDialog 307: OpenColumnArrangeDialog 308: BrowseScript 309: ExitSubReportDesign 310: OpenParameterQueryDialog 311: OpenDataSetSetupDialog 351-370: Free Table operations 401-409: Add report elements 501-520: Alignment operations 600-627: Font and text alignment Return value: 0 to allow action, non-zero to cancel action
      void onDataChange()
      DataChange - Triggered when the report data changes
      void onExplorerContextMenu()
      ExplorerContextMenu - Triggered when right-clicking on the explorer panel
      void onInspectorChange()
      InspectorChange - Triggered when the inspector property changes
      void onInspectorContextMenu()
      InspectorContextMenu - Triggered when right-clicking on the inspector panel
      void onLayoutPanelContextMenu()
      LayoutPanelContextMenu - Triggered when right-clicking on the layout panel
      void onOpenReport()
      OpenReport - Triggered when a report is opened in the designer
      void onRequestData(int pReport)
      RequestData - Triggered when the report designer requests data Parameters: pReport - Report object pointer (can be used to get IGridppReport interface)
      void onSaveReport()
      SaveReport - Triggered when a report is saved from the designer

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      • onSaveReport

        public void onSaveReport()
        SaveReport - Triggered when a report is saved from the designer

      • onBeforeDoAction

        public int onBeforeDoAction(int actionEnum)
        BeforeDoAction - Triggered before each task action is executed Parameters: actionEnum - Action enumeration value: 101: Undo 102: Redo 103: Cut 104: Paste 105: Copy 106: Delete 107: SelectAll 201: AutoAdjustTextBoxSize 202: AutoGenerateColumns 203: AutoGenerateFields 204: MoveSectionUp 205: MoveSectionDown 206: AutoGenerateParameters 207: AutoGenerateDataSetFields 301: OpenPageSetupDialog 302: OpenDataBindingDialog 303: OpenParameterCollectionDialog 304: OpenGroupCollectionDialog 305: OpenColumnCollectionDialog 306: OpenFieldCollectionDialog 307: OpenColumnArrangeDialog 308: BrowseScript 309: ExitSubReportDesign 310: OpenParameterQueryDialog 311: OpenDataSetSetupDialog 351-370: Free Table operations 401-409: Add report elements 501-520: Alignment operations 600-627: Font and text alignment Return value: 0 to allow action, non-zero to cancel action
        参数:
        actionEnum - Action enumeration value
        返回:
        0 to allow action, non-zero to cancel action

      • onRequestData

        public void onRequestData(int pReport)
        RequestData - Triggered when the report designer requests data Parameters: pReport - Report object pointer (can be used to get IGridppReport interface)
        参数:
        pReport - Report object pointer
